Exact arXiv locator for Croot-Lev-Pach progression-free Z_4^n result; records a reviewable source locator without changing the finding assertion.

payload.text: arXiv:1605.01506 states that for n > 0, any 3-term-progression-free subset of Z_4^n has size below 4^(c n) for c about 0.926.

transitions.reason: Attach source-backed abstract span for the Croot-Lev-Pach Z_4^n bound; does not change the assertion.
Exact arXiv locator for Bloom-Sisask Roth log-barrier result; records a reviewable source locator without changing the finding assertion.

payload.text: arXiv:2007.03528 states that if A in {1,...,N} has no non-trivial 3-term arithmetic progressions, then |A| is bounded by N/(log N)^(1+c) for some absolute c > 0.

transitions.reason: Attach source-backed abstract span for the Bloom-Sisask Roth log-barrier result; does not change the assertion.
Exact arXiv locator for Ellenberg-Gijswijt cap-set result; records a reviewable source locator without changing the finding assertion.

payload.text: arXiv:1605.09223 states that the Croot-Lev-Pach method bounds progression-free subsets of F_q^n by c^n with c < q; for q = 3 this is the cap-set problem.

transitions.reason: Attach source-backed abstract span for the Ellenberg-Gijswijt cap-set result; leaves the numeric constant as methodology context rather than new accepted evidence.
Register theorem-level locators for the Sidon v0.358 slice without claiming formal proof.
Register Lean proof-assistant slots for theorem-level Sidon follow-up; no proof completion is claimed.

caveats: Improved LOWER BOUND (a verified large Sidon set), NOT a proven maximum; true a(10) may be larger.
VERIFIED valid by verify_construction.verify_sidon (66 points, 2211 pairwise sums distinct), 3 independent checkers.
